## Verses (30)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Have you knowledge of the rock-goats? or do you see the roes giving birth to their young? | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Is the number of their months fixed by you? or is the time when they give birth ordered by you? | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | They are bent down, they give birth to their young, they let loose the fruit of their body. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Their young ones are strong, living in the open country; they go out and do not come back again. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Who has let the ass of the fields go free? or made loose the bands of the loud-voiced beast? | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | To whom I have given the waste land for a heritage, and the salt land as a living-place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He makes sport of the noise of the town; the voice of the driver does not come to his ears; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | He goes looking for his grass-lands in the mountains, searching out every green thing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Will the ox of the mountains be your servant? or is his night's resting-place by your food-store? | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Will he be pulling your plough with cords, turning up the valleys after you? | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Will you put your faith in him, because his strength is great? will you give the fruit of your work into his care? | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Will you be looking for him to come back, and get in your seed to the crushing-floor? | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Is the wing of the ostrich feeble, or is it because she has no feathers, | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | That she puts her eggs on the earth, warming them in the dust, | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Without a thought that they may be crushed by the foot, and broken by the beasts of the field? | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | She is cruel to her young ones, as if they were not hers; her work is to no purpose; she has no fear. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | For God has taken wisdom from her mind, and given her no measure of knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | When she is shaking her wings on high, she makes sport of the horse and of him who is seated on him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Do you give strength to the horse? is it by your hand that his neck is clothed with power? | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Is it through you that he is shaking like a locust, in the pride of his loud-sounding breath? | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | He is stamping with joy in the valley; he makes sport of fear. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | In his strength he goes out against the arms of war, turning not away from the sword. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | The bow is sounding against him; he sees the shining point of spear and arrow. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Shaking with passion, he is biting the earth; he is not able to keep quiet at the sound of the horn; | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | When it comes to his ears he says, Aha! He is smelling the fight from far off, and hearing the thunder of the captains, and the war-cries. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | Is it through your knowledge that the hawk takes his flight, stretching out his wings to the south? | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | Or is it by your orders that the eagle goes up, and makes his resting-place on high? | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | On the rock is his house, and on the mountain-top his strong place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | From there he is watching for food; his eye sees it far off. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | His young have blood for their drink, and where the dead bodies are, there is he to be seen. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
